notes: Textolite AG-4S glass-reinforced plastic. ~1.7-1.9 g/cm³, unidirectional tensile 300-400 MPa. Used as intermediate layer in Soviet/Russian tank composite arrays (T-64/T-72/T-90 glacis). RHAe ~0.3-0.5 per mm vs KE. Functions as low-density filler between steel plates to disrupt long-rod penetrators. Fiberglass splinters create secondary fragmentation. BHN not applicable — value shown is theoretical equivalent.
